# Suzhou Dexin Advanced Ceramics Co., Ltd.

> Manufacturer of ceramic foam filters, fireproof ceramic insulation materials and
> casting auxiliaries for foundries and high-temperature industries. Founded 2005.
> Production bases in Suzhou and Nantong, Jiangsu, China. Exports worldwide.
> 苏州德鑫陶瓷新材料有限公司 — 专业陶瓷耐火材料制造商，始于2005。

Key facts:
- Founded: 2005 (21+ years of manufacturing)
- Plants: Suzhou (No. 65 Zijin Road, New District) and Nantong (Tongzhou Bay New Area), Jiangsu, China
- Capacity: 2 foam-ceramic production lines, ~2,000 m³ of foam filters per year
- Max service temperature: 1,760 °C; 1,600 °C shuttle kilns; 100% batch QC testing
- Certifications: ISO 9001; director member of the Jiangsu Foundry Association
- Languages: English and Chinese sales support
- Contact: sales@dexintc.com · Tel +86-512-68182825 · WhatsApp +86 137 7606 7838

## Product lines

- [Ceramic Foam Filters](https://szdexintc.com/products.html?cat=filters): reticulated
  foam and straight-hole filters in silicon carbide (SiC, for iron/copper), alumina
  (for aluminium), zirconia (for steel) and mullite — trap inclusions and slag for
  cleaner, higher-yield castings.
- [Ceramic Fireproof & Insulation Materials](https://szdexintc.com/products.html?cat=insulation):
  refractory insulation boards and shapes graded 1,000–1,500 °C for furnace linings,
  molten-metal handling and high-temperature protection.
- [Casting Auxiliaries](https://szdexintc.com/products.html?cat=casting): riser sleeves,
  core-support products, coatings and pastes for foundry processes.

## Pages

- [Home](https://szdexintc.com/): company overview
- [Products](https://szdexintc.com/products.html): full catalog with spec tables
- [Industries](https://szdexintc.com/industries.html): iron, steel, aluminium & copper
  casting, investment casting, industrial furnaces
- [About](https://szdexintc.com/about.html): history, plants, certifications
- [Contact](https://szdexintc.com/contact.html): address, phone, WhatsApp, inquiry form
